semantic.role: Defines the project metadata, dependency graph, executable entry points, and runtime requirements for the ArchSpine mirror governance system.
responsibilities: Orchestrates the dependency tree for static analysis (AST-grep), LLM integration (Google Gemini, OpenAI), persistent storage (better-sqlite3), CLI interaction, and documentation generation.
Configures the build, test, and release pipeline via devDependencies (TypeScript, ESLint, Vitest, VitePress).
Declares the two CLI binaries (`archspine` and `spine`) that form the user-facing interface.
Sets the minimum Node.js engine version (>=20) to ensure core API compatibility.
invariants: The project must always use the `Apache-2.0` license.
Node.js version must be >=20; any environment with an older runtime is unsupported.
The lockfile version is fixed to 3 (npm v7+), preventing unintended dependency resolution drift.

English.role: Defines the project metadata, dependency graph, executable entry points, and runtime requirements for the ArchSpine mirror governance system.

parameter_definitions.name: archspine — Uniquely identifies the package in the npm ecosystem; used by package managers and registries.
parameter_definitions.version: 1.0.0 — Initial release version. Semantic versioning must be maintained to signal breaking changes.
parameter_definitions.bin: archspine and spine — Two CLI entry points that must point to the compiled JavaScript entry; any misconfiguration breaks the entire command-line interface.
parameter_definitions.engines: node >=20 — Gatekeeping the runtime; if a user attempts to run on an older Node.js, npm will warn or refuse, enforcing system requirements.
parameter_definitions.dependencies: Production dependencies such as ast-grep, better-sqlite3, and LLM SDKs. These directly affect functionality; version ranges must be locked to avoid regressions in parsing, database, or AI connectivity.
parameter_definitions.devDependencies: TypeScript, ESLint, Vitest, VitePress — These control development workflow and documentation building. Mismatched versions can break CI, build, or test pipelines.
parameter_definitions.lockfileVersion: 3 — Ensures deterministic installs across environments. Changing this could allow dependency resolution drift, leading to 'works on my machine' bugs.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration file is the root dependency manifest. Any misconfiguration (e.g., incorrect version ranges, missing lockfile, engine mismatch) can cause complete build failures, runtime crashes, or security vulnerabilities from unvetted transitive dependencies. The fixed engine requirement (node >=20) prevents silent API breakage. The dual binary entry points must remain consistent; renaming or removing them silently breaks the CLI user experience. Regular dependency updates are critical — especially for security-critical packages like undici, node-fetch, and the LLM SDKs. The devDependencies for documentation (VitePress) and testing (Vitest) affect the reliability of documentation generation and test suites, which in turn impacts developer confidence and release quality.

Simplified Chinese.role: 定义 ArchSpine 镜像治理系统的项目元数据、依赖关系图、可执行入口点和运行时要求。

parameter_definitions.name: archspine — 在 npm 生态系统中唯一标识此包；包管理和注册表使用此字段。
parameter_definitions.version: 1.0.0 — 初始发布版本。必须遵循语义化版本，以标明破坏性变更。
parameter_definitions.bin: archspine 和 spine — 两个 CLI 入口点，必须指向编译后的 JavaScript 入口；配置错误会导致整个命令行界面崩溃。
parameter_definitions.engines: node >=20 — 运行时门控；如果用户尝试在更旧的 Node.js 上运行，npm 将警告或拒绝，从而强制执行系统要求。
parameter_definitions.dependencies: 生产依赖，如 ast-grep、better-sqlite3 和 LLM SDK。这些直接影响功能；必须锁定版本范围以避免解析、数据库或 AI 连接方面的回归。
parameter_definitions.devDependencies: TypeScript、ESLint、Vitest、VitePress — 控制开发工作流和文档构建。版本不匹配可能破坏 CI、构建或测试流水线。
parameter_definitions.lockfileVersion: 3 — 确保跨环境的确定性安装。更改此设置可能导致依赖解析漂移，引发“在我机器上可以运行”的 bug。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置文件是根依赖清单。任何配置错误（如版本范围不正确、缺少锁文件、引擎不匹配）都可能导致完全构建失败、运行时崩溃，或未受审查的传递依赖带来安全漏洞。固定的引擎要求（node >=20）防止了静默的 API 兼容性破坏。双二进制入口必须保持一致；重命名或移除它们会静默破坏 CLI 用户体验。定期更新依赖至关重要——尤其是 undici、node-fetch 和 LLM SDK 等安全关键包。文档生成（VitePress）和测试（Vitest）的 devDependencies 影响文档生成和测试套件的可靠性，进而影响开发者信心和发布质量。
